name: Patligian Moussaka
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice eggplants into 1/4 inch rounds.
2. Sprinkle eggplant slices generously with salt and let stand until the eggplants sweat.
3. Thoroughly wash off the salt and squeeze out excess moisture, then dry.
4. Brown ground meat in olive oil.
5. Add remaining ingredients to the pan and stir.
6. Layer eggplant and meat mixture alternately (eggplant first) in a covered glass casserole dish.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
8. Optionally, add layers of Monterey Jack cheese between eggplant and meat.
